zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Stourton於1503年出生在英國維爾爾斯圖頓時，她的父親William Stourton19歲，母親Margaret Wrottesley24歲。她和Sir William Richard Warre至少有8個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1540年10月3日在英國薩默塞特賀斯特爾可姆享年37歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Stourton was born in 1503, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Stourton, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Wrottesley, was 24. She had at least 8 sons and 5 daughters with Sir William Richard Warre. She died on 3 October 1540, in Hestercombe, Somerset, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Stourton est née en 1503, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Stourton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wrottesley, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles avec Sir William Richard Warre. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1540, à Hestercombe, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Stourtonが1503年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父William Stourtonは19歳，母Margaret Wrottesleyは24歳であった。彼女はSir William Richard Warreとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1540年10月3日にイギリスソメルセトヘステルコンベで37歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Stourton(이)가 1503년 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stourton(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Wrottesley(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Richard Warre(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 10월 3일 영국 서머세트 헤스터코브에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir William Richard Warre. Она умерла 3 октября 1540 г. в местности хестиркомб, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.
